name: Merchant Negotiation
description: A shrewd peddler blocks the road with his overloaded cart, offering passage only to those who can strike a fair bargain. His eyes gleam as he sizes up your purse, but a silver tongue may win more than coin ever could.
failureConsequence: The merchant sneers at your poor haggling and doubles his prices. You overpay dearly for meagre supplies, losing coin and dignity in equal measure.
